name: Chocolate Nut Clusters
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Granulated Sugar and C & H
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together butter, granulated sugar and C & H, egg, and vanilla extract.
2. Stir in the melted unsweetened chocolate.
3. Combine the all-purpose flour, salt, and baking powder with the chocolate mixture.
4. Blend until well incorporated.
5. Stir in the nuts.
6. Drop by teaspoonfuls onto a greased cookie sheet.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes. The cookies should be soft when removed from the oven.
8. Cool on a rack. Makes about 40 cookies.
